title: roella bracteata
intro: Roella bracteata, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, is commonly known as the Rock Roella. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Roella bracteata include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Roella bracteata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
